title: papaver dubium var. laevigatum
intro: Papaver dubium var. laevigatum, also known as smooth poppy or field poppy, is a perennial plant species within the Papaver dubium species. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its alkaloid content, which has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and acting as an antispasmodic. Herbal preparations of Papaver dubium var. laevigatum may include dried flowers or roots, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
